name: Montville Pickleball & Golf Club
description:
Welcome to Montville Pickleball & Golf Club. 
We are one of the first and only facilities in New Jersey using Acrytech Cushion X 4mm flooring at our facility. We have 8 indoor, temperature controlled courts on which we host organized open plays, rental private court rentals by the hour, teach clinics, private lessons, group lessons, drills, play with a pro as well as an assortment of different social mixers. If you ever need to reach me the owner of the club, feel free to call me at (201) 691-4201.

Thank you
